description: Narrow capability set for the tray-resident Drop Stack window. The dropstack webview only needs to enumerate / mutate the in-memory Drop Stack registry, dispatch its accumulated paths into copy/move jobs via the existing IPC, and listen for the live `dropstack-changed` / activity events. Permissions intentionally exclude `core:webview:allow-create-webview-window` and other reach the main window has so a future content-injection bug in dropstack.html can't pivot to spawning new webviews or accessing tray / menu surfaces the parent owns.
